name: Football Prehab Program Rollout
notes: Rollout of the high-school football prehab program with the coaching staff: warm-up protocols, weekly prehab circuits, and in-season maintenance for the team.

name: Baseline Movement Screening
notes: Pre-season movement screening for the football roster: screening windows, station setup, and group-level results tracking by position group.

name: Prehab Equipment and Supplies
notes: Ordering and organizing resistance bands, mini-bands, foam rollers, and station equipment for the team prehab circuits.

name: Practice and Field Coordination
notes: Coordinating prehab field time, station rotations, and scheduling around football practice blocks with the coaching staff.

name: Sunday Dinner Rotation
notes: Sunday dinner planning at Brenda's after New Hope AME service: menu, dish assignments, and grocery list.

name: Coach Education and Training
notes: Training assistant and position coaches to lead prehab routines: cueing, progressions, and station coverage.

name: Prehab Compliance Board
notes: Group-level compliance tracking for the prehab circuits by position group: attendance, completion, and weekly trends.

name: Prehab Protocol Playbook
notes: Standardized warm-up cues, hamstring and ankle prehab circuits, and station templates for the coaching staff.

name: Weekly Meal Prep
notes: Sunday-night meal prep for the week: protein, grains, and grab-and-go breakfasts before 5:15 AM runs.

name: Personal Running Log
notes: Daily mileage, pace, and effort notes for the 5:15 AM Crestwood South loop and Saturday long runs.

name: Athlete Buy-In and Communication
notes: Player and parent handouts, prehab why-it-matters messaging, and team buy-in materials for the program rollout.

name: Strength and Conditioning Integration
notes: Aligning the prehab circuits with the team lifting cycle and plyometric progressions led by the strength staff.

name: Iron City Charity 5K
notes: Planning the Iron City Sports Medicine charity 5K: course, volunteers, sponsors, and packet pickup.

name: In-Season Prehab Maintenance
notes: Keeping the hamstring and ankle prehab circuits running through the season with reduced-volume in-season blocks.

name: Program Launch Day Prep
notes: Kickoff logistics for the prehab program launch: station layout, group assignments, and first-week schedule.

name: Church and Choir Planning
notes: Men's choir section practice schedule and New Hope AME service coordination for 1st and 3rd Sundays.

name: Holiday Family Plans
notes: Thanksgiving, Christmas, and Watch Night planning at Brenda's: travel, dishes, and gift list.

name: Prehab Demo Video Library
notes: Short demo clips of each prehab drill and station, organized by body region for coaches and athletes.

name: Program Outcomes Review
notes: Season-level review of prehab participation and availability trends across position groups to refine next year's rollout.

name: Position Group Circuits
notes: Tailoring prehab circuits by position group: line, skill, and special teams emphasis and station rotations.
